title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that the AI agent industry has normalized unreliability, with error compounding across multi-step workflows making most agents fail in production. He contends that shipping reliable agents requires focus on taste and dogfooding practices over raw performance metrics.
